Re-scan covered areas through the new lenses only.

M5a.notes: Planner found the brief's uniform premise infeasible: only styles has clean CDP parity. structure = CDP-portable subset (camelCase, loses dimensions/scroll/text); events = CAPABILITY REGRESSION (CDP getEventListeners can't see inline on* or framework/React handlers the JS path sees); animations+assets = NO CDP path in the repo at all. M6 goldens (structure/events characterization entries, already M5a-marked) are the gate; styles + other goldens are the green tripwire. clone_element_complete TOOL uses comprehensive_element_cloner NOT ElementCloner.clone_element_complete (gather blast radius only via clone_element_complete_to_file). _to_file twins inherit the fix transitively (0 direct .evaluate/.send). Dedup: converge onto CDPElementCloner (M5b's canonical engine), not a 3rd copy.
open_questions: SCOPE (the decision): (A) narrow structure+events now [events = accepted capability loss] | (A') structure-only now [one clean non-regressing win] | (B) full incl. hand-written animations/assets CDP [M5b redoes, animations parity likely unreachable — not recommended] | (C) fold entire convergence into M5b [bounded severity removes urgency; cleanest dedup; cost = <=30s bounded degradation on stale-connection pathological pages until M5b, which is plan 12/13]
